summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Al-Haram OS (Crowd Services Platform) - Arabic RTL crowd management system for Mecca. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate) and frontend UI fully functional with proper RTL layout, navigation, and data integration.
passed_tests: All 21 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Dashboard loads with statistics cards, charts, and department status
RTL layout properly implemented for Arabic interface
Navigation sidebar works correctly with all department pages
Gates management page displays gates with status and filters
Plazas management page shows plaza cards and distribution chart
Mataf management page displays levels and crowd statistics
Crowd services, planning, reports, notifications, settings pages load correctly
Mobile responsive design with working mobile menu
Charts and data visualization rendering properly
Arabic text displaying correctly throughout the application
Real-time data updates from backend APIs
Status badges and progress bars working correctly
Filters and interactive elements functioning properly
